With that swell and offshore wind, today's 2.7m Cantinho might actually be alright, for once.
🌊 Swell: 2.7m @ 15s 💨 Wind: 20.0km/h ESE (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 42.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.9m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind • Long period - powerful waves
